name: fastlane
description: App automation for iOS and Android

subcommands.name: action
subcommands.description: Shows more information for a specific command

args.name: [tool_name]
args.description: The name of the tool you want to see the details of

subcommands.name: add_plugin
subcommands.description: Add a new plugin to your fastlane setup

subcommands.name: docs
subcommands.description: Generate a markdown based documentation based on the Fastfile

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite the existing README.md in the ./fastlane folder

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Helps you with your initial fastlane setup

subcommands.name: match
subcommands.description: Easily sync your certificates and profiles across your team using Git

options.name: --type
options.description: Create a certificate for (appstore, adhoc, developer, enterprise)

options.name: --readonly
options.description: Only fetch existing certificates and profiles, don't generate new ones

options.name: --app_identifier
options.description: The bundle identifier of your app

options.name: --git_url
options.description: URL to the git repo containing all the certificates

options.name: --scheme
options.description: The project's scheme. Make sure it's marked as `Shared`

options.name: --clean
options.description: Should the project be cleaned before building?

options.name: --export_method
options.description: Method used to export the archive. (app-store, ad-hoc, package, enterprise, development, developer-id, mac-application)

subcommands.name: scan
subcommands.description: Run tests for your iOS and Mac apps

options.name: --scheme
options.description: The project's scheme. Make sure it's marked as `Shared`

options.name: --device
options.description: The name of the simulator type you want to run tests on

globalOptions.name: --verbose
globalOptions.description: Print out extra information and all commands
